rationale: Hard pass for Crowd City. The archetype leans on licensed anime IP (Dragon Ball Z) with a single-hero power-charging shot — there is zero read-through to Crowd City's swarming/consuming low-poly stickman loop, and using Goku imagery is an IP/legal nonstarter. Audience overlap is narrow (anime-RPG fans skew older/midcore vs. Crowd City's broad hypercasual base), and the cyan/magenta palette plus static hype framing also clashes with the game's bright primary-color, motion-driven crowd visuals.
